title: Fresh Animations x Bare Bones Piglin Skeletons
description: Adds piglin skeletons and tweaks piglin models and textures, for fresh animations
body:
This pack adds piglin variants of the skeleton and wither skeleton. It also makes some small changes to the models and textures of piglins.

When in the nether:  
- Skeletons will spawn as piglin skeletons two thirds of the time.  
- Wither skeletons will spawn as piglin wither skeletons one quarter of the time.

Piglins' snouts are now two pixels long, and their ears have more detail in the texture.  
Zombie piglins' skin colour is slightly different, and their heads now have two layers for the skull and skin.

---

Requires [_Entity Model Features_](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitymodelfeatures) (or Optifine) and [_Fresh Animations_](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) version 1.10.0 or higher.

This is the version supporting fresh animations. You can find the vanilla version [here](https://modrinth.com/project/bare-bones-piglin-skeletons).  
 
Note that this is _not_ an addon pack. You will not need the vanilla version if you use the fresh animations one.

---
